---
title: "Reproducibility Best Practices"
---

{{< include topics/project-organizing.qmd >}}

{{< include activities/create-readme.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/organization-recs.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/reproducible-coding.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/code-comments.qmd >}}

{{< include activities/comment-code.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/consider-functions.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/fair-care-data.qmd >}}
